'''''Jabba's Palace Sealed Deck''''' were promotional products created by [[Decipher]] in [[October]] [[2000]], as an addition to the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] (or SWCCG). They are a product that contains cards which in conjunction with [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] and [[Enhanced Jabba's Palace]], chronicle the first portion of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] for the SWCCG.

==Publisher's summary==
''Each box contains six Limited Jabba's Palace expansion packs and 20 new and exclusive cards - ten for each Side of the Force. Revisit and enhance strategies introduced in earlier card sets. Straight ahead is the best Sealed Deck play ever offered on the far side of Tatooine. Meet your opponent head-to-head in the bowels of Jabba's dungeon, or fight it out in the sand dunes.''

==Media==
===Card list===
The 20 premium cards are as follows:
*[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] Influence
*[[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]: Lower Passages
*[[Unidentified mercenary pilot|Mercenary Pilot]]
*Mighty [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]]
*My Kind Of Scum / Fearless And Inventive
*No Escape
*Power Of The Hutt
*[[Racing skiff/Legends|Racing Skiff]] (Dark Side)
*Stun Blaster (Dark Side)
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]: Desert Heart
*Agents In The Court / No Love For [[Galactic Empire/Legends|The Empire]]
*Jabba's Palace: Antechamber
*[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando]] With [[Vibro-ax/Legends|Vibro-Ax]]
*Ounee Ta
*Palace Raider
*Racing Skiff (Light Side)
*Seeking An Audience
*Stun Blaster (Light Side)
*Tatooine: Hutt Trade Route (Desert)
*Underworld Contacts
